// What's in the kit

Complete Transformation,
One Package.

Everything your classroom needs — delivered, replenished, and ready to use.

🧪

12 TEKS-Aligned Experiments

Every lab maps directly to Texas Essential Knowledge and Skills standards, so you're always audit-ready and curriculum-compliant.

⏱️

Zero Prep Time

Pre-measured pipets, ready-to-run reagents, and 30-minute turnkey lab setups. Back-to-back classes? No problem.

📊

Built-in Assessments

Formative and summative assessments included with every experiment so you have data-driven insights on student performance from day one.

🎬

Career Videos Included

Each kit ships with STEM career awareness videos that connect the chemistry to real-world professions students can aspire to.

📦

Annual Consumables Plan

We automatically replenish your consumables every year. One vendor, one invoice, zero chemical sourcing headaches.

📅

Year-at-a-Glance Plan

The only supplier that gives you a full chemical reuse map — see exactly what you have, what you'll need, and when to order.

// Our Model

Simple,
Transparent
Pricing.

Buy the base kit once. Subscribe to consumables annually. No hidden fees, no multi-vendor chaos.

Option 01

Bulk School License

District or school-wide purchase at a reduced per-kit rate. Ideal for curriculum directors making a single annual buy.

Option 02

Individual Teacher Kit

Single classroom purchase at standard price. Higher margin, same full kit experience — perfect for teacher-driven adoption.

Option 03 · Recurring

Annual Consumables Subscription

Automatic yearly replenishment tied to your experiment schedule. Purchasing windows align with district budget cycles (May–Sept).

// Field Research

Built on What
Teachers Actually Said.

We interviewed teachers and curriculum directors across Texas to design a product that solves real problems, not assumed ones.

"Buying chemicals from multiple vendors gets expensive."
— Former Texas High School Science Curriculum Director → Pivot: Base Kit + Annual Consumables
"Back-to-back classes leave zero setup time."
— Current Chemistry Teacher → Design: 30-min turnkey labs, pre-measured pipets
"No vendor shows a year-at-a-glance chemical reuse plan."
— Current Chemistry Teacher → Opportunity: Full reuse roadmap included
// Ethics & Culture

How We Build,
Sell & Support.

Our culture is rooted in integrity — from the science inside each kit to the price on the invoice.

🔬

Science Integrity

Every experiment is scientifically sound and pedagogically validated before it ships.

📐

TEKS Aligned

🎯

Authentic Learning

Real experiments with real outcomes. No simulations, no shortcuts.

📈

Data-Driven

💰

Transparent Pricing

What you see is what you pay. No surprise fees, no opaque vendor markups.
